mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log ( module, operation, request_method, request_uri, java_method, request_params, operator_id, operator_username, ip, status, error_message, cost_time ) VALUES ( #{module}, #{operation}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUri}, #{javaMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorUsername}, #{ip}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{costTime} )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, module, operation, request_method, request_uri, java_method, request_params, operator_id, operator_username, ip, status, error_message, cost_time FROM operation_log
AND module LIKE CONCAT('%', #{module}, '%')
AND operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operation}, '%')
AND operator_username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operatorUsername}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND request_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{requestMethod}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM operation_log
AND module LIKE CONCAT('%', #{module}, '%')
AND operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operation}, '%')
AND operator_username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operatorUsername}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND request_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{requestMethod}, '%')
